list.name: Changes
list.comment: Remove inline `sitemap-editor.inline.css` file for cleaner codebase structure and to eliminate unused styles.

task.summary: Add project configuration files and initial styles for sitemap-editor
Update project configuration and clean up unused styles and components
Update workspace and UI components to enhance app-mode toggles and toolbar layout
Add HTML cursor preview page and initial sitemap data model file

Add drag-to-place functionality for palette elements (pages and areas)
Introduces the ability to drag elements (Pages, Areas) from the palette to specific locations in the viewport. Includes dynamic edge index refreshing to prevent stale indices and updates for hit-paths and tool interactions. Simplifies interaction logic and adjusts related CSS and toolbar layout.

Add initial sitemap JSON model and enhancements to editor functionality
Introduces a detailed sitemap data model (`ecommerce-sitemap.sitemap.json`) and integrates it with the editor. Updates include dynamic slug handling, visible URL hints (sub-lines) under page titles, hand-cursor improvements, and consistent hover affordances for newly created pages. Refines line width defaults, slug synchronization, and imported node styling for consistency.

Add Path mode: reverse-BFS highlights routes from roots to target page
Introduces a new Path mode with UI enhancements and keyboard toggle (4). Clicking a page highlights its route from every root using reverse-BFS, applying `.path-on`, `.path-root`, `.path-target`, and `.path-dim` classes for distinct visual emphasis. Includes Escape-to-clear functionality and corresponding CSS refinements.

Add Heatmap and Monitor modes with dynamic test coverage and pass rate visualization
Introduces two new app modes (Heatmap and Monitor) with corresponding UI, backend integration (mocked), and keyboard shortcuts (5 and 6). Heatmap mode visualizes page traversal density (test cases per page), while Monitor mode shows live test pass rates. Includes legends, responsive tooltips, periodic data polling for Monitor mode, and comprehensive CSS enhancements for both modes.

Add sitemap JSON model for Streamflix and initialize editor support
Introduces `streamflix-sitemap.sitemap.json` detailing pages, areas, and connections for the sitemap. Lays groundwork for seamless integration with the editor, supporting structured navigation and visualization.

Organize and expand `sitemap-editor.css` into 23 structured sections, adding comprehensive comments, improving readability, aligning with UI features like modes/toolbars, and restoring missing styles for inspector actions and SVG elements.
Remove inline `sitemap-editor.inline.css` file for cleaner codebase structure and to eliminate unused styles.

MESSAGE.value: Add project configuration files and initial styles for sitemap-editor
Update project configuration and clean up unused styles and components
Remove "Dissolve" functionality and related assets from sitemap-editor.
Update workspace and UI components to enhance app-mode toggles and toolbar layout
Add HTML cursor preview page and initial sitemap data model file

Add drag-to-place functionality for palette elements (pages and areas)
Introduces the ability to drag elements (Pages, Areas) from the palette to specific locations in the viewport. Includes dynamic edge index refreshing to prevent stale indices and updates for hit-paths and tool interactions. Simplifies interaction logic and adjusts related CSS and toolbar layout.

Add initial sitemap JSON model and enhancements to editor functionality
Introduces a detailed sitemap data model (`ecommerce-sitemap.sitemap.json`) and integrates it with the editor. Updates include dynamic slug handling, visible URL hints (sub-lines) under page titles, hand-cursor improvements, and consistent hover affordances for newly created pages. Refines line width defaults, slug synchronization, and imported node styling for consistency.

Add Path mode: reverse-BFS highlights routes from roots to target page
Introduces a new Path mode with UI enhancements and keyboard toggle (4). Clicking a page highlights its route from every root using reverse-BFS, applying `.path-on`, `.path-root`, `.path-target`, and `.path-dim` classes for distinct visual emphasis. Includes Escape-to-clear functionality and corresponding CSS refinements.

Add Heatmap and Monitor modes with dynamic test coverage and pass rate visualization
Introduces two new app modes (Heatmap and Monitor) with corresponding UI, backend integration (mocked), and keyboard shortcuts (5 and 6). Heatmap mode visualizes page traversal density (test cases per page), while Monitor mode shows live test pass rates. Includes legends, responsive tooltips, periodic data polling for Monitor mode, and comprehensive CSS enhancements for both modes.

Add sitemap JSON model for Streamflix and initialize editor support
Introduces `streamflix-sitemap.sitemap.json` detailing pages, areas, and connections for the sitemap. Lays groundwork for seamless integration with the editor, supporting structured navigation and visualization.

Organize and expand `sitemap-editor.css` into 23 structured sections, adding comprehensive comments, improving readability, aligning with UI features like modes/toolbars, and restoring missing styles for inspector actions and SVG elements.
Remove inline `sitemap-editor.inline.css` file for cleaner codebase structure and to eliminate unused styles.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Remove inline `sitemap-editor.inline.css` file for cleaner codebase structure and to eliminate unused styles.
